reviews.comment:
Histórica estación de servicio que, como muchas del ACA, ha quedado mal ubicada y que parece discriminada porque suele tener faltantes de algunos combustibles

A historic service station that, like many ACA stations, has been poorly located and seems discriminated against because it often has shortages of some fuels.

reviews.comment:
Hermosas Instalaciones con servicio de pileta, años arboleda con gran distribución de parrillas, calles por las que se puede pasear en bicicleta o simplemente caminar además de contar con canchas de tenis y fútbol.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful facilities with a swimming pool, mature trees with a large distribution of grills, streets where you can ride a bicycle or simply walk, as well as having tennis and soccer courts.
